text: In these dimly lit, almost surreal corridors, I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with an unsettling calm. The glow from the distant room suggests something vibrant hidden within an otherwise sterile and empty environment. The 'R + D' wall reminds me of the eternal human drive to innovate, to search and to question our surroundings. I'm both alienated and drawn in, reflective in the silence, contemplating the boundaries between isolation and discovery.
